feed.title: Weekend Loaf
feed.subtitle: Weekend Loaf - Artisanal masala breads and spiced snacks with tikka herbs and spices. Fresh, hand-baked products with traditional techniques and clean ingredients.

entry.title: Classic Masala Loaf - Artisanal Spiced Bread with Tikka Herbs

link.title: Classic Masala Loaf - Artisanal Spiced Bread with Tikka Herbs

entry.content:
Our signature masala loaf infused with authentic tikka herbs. Bold cumin, warm coriander, and fresh ginger create a complex, savory bread that pairs perfectly with curries or stands beautifully on its own. This artisanal loaf is hand-shaped and baked fresh every weekend using traditional techniques and clean ingredients.

Available: Pre-order & pickup.
Price: Please check the WhatsApp Catalog store for updated prices
Pre-order: Message us on WhatsApp
entry.summary: Our signature masala loaf, hand-baked with aromatic tikka herbs, warm spices, and fresh coriander. Perfect with curries or standalone.

entry.title: Masala Cashew Nuts - Spiced Snacks with Tikka Herbs

link.title: Masala Cashew Nuts - Spiced Snacks with Tikka Herbs

entry.content:
Experience our delicious spiced cashew nuts roasted to perfection with a blend of aromatic Indian spices including authentic tikka herbs. These premium, hand-roasted cashews are perfect for snacking, entertaining, or as a crunchy addition to salads and curries. Each batch is crafted with care using quality ingredients and traditional spice blending techniques.

Available: Pre-order and pickup.
Price: Please check the WhatsApp catalog store for updated prices.
Pre-order: Message us on WhatsApp
entry.summary: Roasted cashew nuts infused with tikka herbs and aromatic Indian spices. Perfect for snacking, entertaining, or adding to salads and curries.

entry.title: Masala Peanuts - Spiced Snacks with Tikka Herbs

link.title: Masala Peanuts - Spiced Snacks with Tikka Herbs

entry.content:
Experience our delicious spiced peanuts roasted to perfection with a blend of aromatic Indian spices including authentic tikka herbs. These premium, hand-roasted peanuts are perfect for snacking, entertaining, or as a crunchy addition to salads and curries. Each batch is crafted with care using quality ingredients and traditional spice blending techniques.

Available: Pre-order and pickup.
Price: Please check the WhatsApp catalog store for updated prices.
Pre-order: Message us on WhatsApp
entry.summary: Roasted peanuts infused with tikka herbs and aromatic Indian spices. Perfect for snacking, entertaining, or adding to salads and curries.
